summary: Completed testing of Bookvia Notification System and Email Sending features. All 10 backend API tests passed. Frontend notification bell UI working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/notifications/unread-count returns correct count - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/notifications returns list of notifications - PASSED
Backend: PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read marks single notification as read - PASSED
Backend: PUT /api/notifications/read-all marks all notifications as read - PASSED
Backend: Notification APIs require authentication (401 without token) - PASSED
Backend: send_booking_confirmation is imported and called in webhook flow (line 3978-3984) - VERIFIED
Backend: send_booking_confirmation is imported and called in checkout fallback (line 3807-3813) - VERIFIED
Backend: send_booking_cancelled is imported and called in cancel_booking_by_user (line 4125-4126) - VERIFIED
Backend: send_booking_cancelled is imported and called in cancel_booking_by_business (line 4268-4270) - VERIFIED
Frontend: Notification bell button visible with data-testid='notification-bell' - PASSED
Frontend: Clicking bell opens notification panel with data-testid='notification-panel' - PASSED
Frontend: Panel shows 11 notification items with data-testid='notif-item-{id}' - PASSED
Frontend: Panel closes on outside click - PASSED
Frontend: 'Marcar todo como leído' button appears when unread notifications exist - PASSED
Frontend: Unread count badge (data-testid='unread-count') shows correct count - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Email functions (send_booking_confirmation, send_booking_cancelled) are properly defined in services/email.py
Email sending is MOCKED in development mode (ENV=development) - emails stored in sent_emails collection instead of being sent via Resend
Notification bell UI correctly uses data-testid attributes for testing
Notification panel auto-closes on outside click via mousedown event listener
Unread count is polled every 30 seconds via setInterval in useEffect
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing business 'Test Real Stripe' with 11 existing notifications.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification system fully tested. Key points: (1) 4 notification endpoints working: GET /notifications, GET /notifications/unread-count, PUT /notifications/{id}/read, PUT /notifications/read-all. (2) Email sending is MOCKED in development - emails stored in sent_emails DB collection. (3) No booking confirmation/cancellation emails in DB yet because no new bookings have been confirmed/cancelled since implementation. (4) Frontend notification bell uses data-testid attributes: notification-bell, notification-panel, unread-count, mark-all-read, notif-item-{id}. (5) Notification types in DB: 'booking', 'system'.

mocked_apis_list: Resend email sending (MOCKED in development mode - emails stored in sent_emails DB collection instead of being sent)

send_booking_confirmation_locations: server.py line 3978-3984 (webhook flow after payment confirmed)
email_integration_verification.email_storage: 22 emails in sent_emails collection (password_reset, verification templates - no booking emails yet as no new bookings confirmed/cancelled since implementation)
